metadata.description: 70 specialized AI skills for production-grade development across React, Python, FastAPI, DevOps, and 60+ more technologies

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Full plugin with all 70 AI skills (68 user-invocable + 2 background), 3 slash commands, and development standards. Covers frontend, backend, DevOps, database, testing, architecture, AI/ML, and specialized domains.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-frontend
plugins.description: 10 frontend development skills: React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Flutter, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, and frontend design.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-backend
plugins.description: 17 backend development skills: Python, FastAPI, Django, NestJS, Rails, Go, Java, Spring Boot, PHP, Laravel, .NET, Rust, C++, and more.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-devops
plugins.description: 7 DevOps and infrastructure skills: CI/CD, Kubernetes, Terraform, cloud platforms, SRE, monitoring, and chaos engineering.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-database
plugins.description: 5 database and data skills: PostgreSQL, SQL optimization, database performance, Pandas, and Apache Spark.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-testing
plugins.description: 6 testing and quality skills: TDD, Playwright E2E, code review, security review, and secure coding practices.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-architecture
plugins.description: 4 architecture and design skills: system architecture, API design, microservices patterns, and GraphQL schema design.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-ai-ml
plugins.description: 4 AI/ML skills: prompt engineering, model fine-tuning, ML pipelines, and RAG system architecture.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-specialized
plugins.description: 8 domain-specific skills: MCP development, WebSockets, CLI tools, game dev, embedded systems, Shopify, WordPress, and Salesforce.

plugins.name: ai-workflow-skills-utilities
plugins.description: 7 workflow utility skills: full-stack features, debugging, documentation, legacy modernization, and requirements gathering.
